category_sources: Official IM Freedom documentation describes GPlugin as a plugin library for GLib based applications.
source_facts.description says GPlugin is a GObject based library that implements a reusable plugin system.
display_name_sources: Official API documentation title is GPlugin.
docs_sources: Official IM Freedom documentation links to the GPlugin API reference and the API page names GPlugin Plugin Library.
repo_sources: Official GPlugin API page lists https://keep.imfreedom.org/gplugin/gplugin/ as both Website and Source.
tags_sources: Official API docs list GLib, GObject, GModule, and Gio dependencies.
source_facts.description identifies a GObject reusable plugin system.
